affected_pattern: Postpaid customers converted from prepaid in the last 30 days showing $0 MonthlyCharges
root_cause: Prepaid-to-postpaid conversion workflow failure — subscriber profile was migrated in the CRM but the recurring charge schedule was never activated in the billing catalog, leaving the account in a zero-recurring state.
supporting_evidence: Zero-Billing RCA Playbook: Plan Conversion Workflow Gap pattern
Conversion timestamp in CRM precedes absence of recurring charge record in billing DB
Ops change ticket CHG-48213 for conversion workflow deployed 32 days ago
recommended_action: Re-trigger recurring charge activation for all conversions in the last 30 days
Back-bill customers from their conversion date per regulatory grace window
Add post-conversion validation step to the workflow DAG
File customer notification before back-billing to comply with consumer protection rules
